rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINA T MASSARO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, July 7, 2010, line 1. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny summary judgment. Grant and deny summary adjudication in part. 2nd cause of action for negligence: Deny. Triable issue of fact whether defendant dropped off plaintiff in a place of relative safety and thus whether plaintiff breached common carrier duty to defendant. See evidence cited by Plaintiff in Plaintiff's response to defendant's separate statement of undisputed material facts, No. 14; evidence cited by plaintiff in Plaintiff's Separate Statement of Undisputed Facts In Opp to Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment, Nos. 18, 24, 34, 35. Lack of common carrier duty: Deny. Triable issue of fact whether defendant dropped off plaintiff in a place of relative safety and thus there is a disputed issue of fact as to when the common carrier duty ended. See evidence cited by Plaintiff in Plaintiff's response to defendant's separate statement of undisputed material facts, No 14; evidence cited by plaintiff in Plaintiff's Separate Statement of Undisputed Facts In Opp to Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment, Nos. 18, 24, 34, 35. 3rd cause of action for dangerous conditions of public property: Summary adjudication granted. Allegedly malfunctioning horn is not a physical defect of public property. See Cerna v. City of Oakland (2008) 161 Cal.App. 4th 1340, 1352. (while existence of dangerous condition is ordinarily question of fact, issue "can be decided as a matter of law if reasonable minds can come to only one conclusion"). Lack of affirmative duty to prevent Plaintiff's accident: Deny. Triable issue of fact whether defendant created a peril for plaintiff. See evidence cited by Plaintiff in Plaintiff's response to Defendant's Separate Statement of Undisputed Material Facts, No. 14; evidence cited by plaintiff in Plaintiff's Separate Statement of Undisputed Facts In Opp to Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment, Nos. 17, 18, 24, 34, 35. Eac
